execution_narrative.intent: Capture SHA-256 snapshot of target folder for restore point
Scan target folder: detect code issues via compileall, AST, dependency analysis
Analyze raw scan results: produce statements and classification
Score information completeness against 93.91% threshold, partition into ready/isolated
Execute fixes on candidate copy only — never touch real target
Wait for all branches to converge, validate results, compute hashes
Auto-mode: apply decision immediately without human pause
Produce final report: resolved items, root causes, documentation
